Setlist
Live Trax Series Release Info Grid
This info grid is of release information for Live Trax. More of these will follow for Live Trax and different release types.

Three Live Trax releases have comprised of multi-show performances - LT6, LT9, and LT30. To display these particular Live Trax in the list below, we have entered each of the performance dates as it's own release but additional info for the first night's show only. Where multiple complete shows are included with the release, we split the entries for CD, length, etc.

Length & CD * - includes filler appended to the release, and the maximum amount of bonus audio (Warehouse seniority bonus discs, etc.)

Rel. to Rel. = Release Date to Release Date. After how many days after the previous Live Trax release, was it released?

Ann. to Rel. = Announce Date to Release Date. After how many days after the Live Trax was announced, was it released?

Rel. to Ann. = Release Date to Announce Date. After how many days after the last Live Trax was released, was this one announced?
Link Release Show Date(s) Venue & Location Announce Date Release Date Rel. to Rel. Ann. to Rel. Rel. to Ann. Length * CDs * Digital Vinyl Video HD-FLAC Ribbon Hex
